'''House Calipsa''' was a [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble house]] that ruled the [[Calipsa Province]], which was located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. House Calipsa was considered the most conservative of the noble houses.

==History==
During the [[Mecetti Purge]], House Calipsa added eight systems formerly belonging to [[House Pelagia]] to their holdings.

==Assets==
Calipsa generates most of its profits from mining and owns a huge fleet of container ships used to transport raw materials. These ships bristle with enchanced shields and also contain a few lasers for added protection.

Unknown to any other House, Calipsa controls a little-known gas giant called [[Coorimbus IV]]. The system is so remote there isn't even an established hyperspace route to it, requiring a series of delicate microjumps instead. The planet produces [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gems]], which are smuggled out of the sector by House Calipsa and sold for huge profits.

===House Defense Forces (0 BBY to 3.5 ABY)===
Calipsa possessed a modest navy consisting of ten [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigates]] and a score of patrol craft.

==Notable Members==
*[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Weston Warsheld]] (High Lord)
*Lord [[Corell Muntique]]
*Sir [[Trevas Jotane]] - incognito ([[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]])
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nils Wender]]
*[[Quat Ralto]]
*[[Edas Vasti]]
*[[Parto Nethathanin]]
*[[Kalista Banto]]
*[[Janos Marsh]] ([[House Melantha]] Agent)

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]'', House Calipsa is mistakenly referred to as "House Caliph" in one paragraph.
